title: pelargonium jensenii
intro: Pelargonium jensenii, also known as Jensen's rose geranium or pink rose geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are said to have various health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting better sleep. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium jensenii include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used topically or taken internally, depending on the specific health concern. Some herbalists and natural health practitioners recommend using Pelargonium jensenii for its potential health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness for certain health conditions.
